subtitle: Deterministic block workflows: chain tools, LLMs and conditions.
empty: No flows. Create one to orchestrate your tools deterministically.

trigger.label: Trigger:
trigger.webhookSaveHint: save to generate URL and token
trigger.loadOnFirstTitle: If off, the flow-tool doesn't enter the chat context: it stays usable only via an agent that includes it.

tool.label: Tool
tool.desc: Runs one of your custom tools (HTTP/SQL/RAG/prompt) with arguments mapped from bindings.

llm.label: LLM
llm.desc: Call to an LLM with interpolated system/user prompts. Output = the generated text.

http.label: HTTP
http.desc: Direct HTTP request (GET/POST/…). Extract a field from the response with responsePath.

skill.label: Skill
skill.desc: Runs a script of an installed skill (Python/Node/JS) in the executor sandbox.

transform.label: Transform
transform.desc: Data transformation in JavaScript (isolated-vm sandbox). Use `return` for the output.

flow.label: Flow
flow.desc: Invokes another flow (sub-flow) with mapped inputs. Recursive composability.

agent.label: Agent
agent.desc: Runs a single Multi-Agent agent with its own tools and model.

team.label: Team
team.desc: Runs a team of agents with its topology (supervisor/sequential/parallel).

condition.label: Condition
condition.desc: Forks the flow: activates the true/false branch based on a comparison. Connect the two handles.

loop.label: Loop
loop.desc: Iterates over an array (binding), running a sub-flow for each item. Output = array.

join.label: Join
join.desc: Fan-in: waits for all predecessors and collects their outputs into an object.

chat.label: Chat
chat.desc: Delivers a message (binding) to a dedicated chat, with notification and unread badge.

node.runNodeTitle: Runs this node and its predecessors (not the whole flow) to populate the real fields in downstream bindings
node.runOk: ✓ executed — fields available in downstream nodes
node.label: Label
node.loopSubFlow: Sub-flow to run for each item
node.loopNote: Output = array of results, one per item.
node.joinNotePre: Synchronizes branches: waits for all predecessors and collects their outputs into an object
node.chatNotePre: Delivers the message to a dedicated chat (reused on later runs), with notification and unread badge. Output =
node.condNote: Connect the two handles below: green = true, red = false.
